description: ¬ß38.13.2 ‚Äî a `watches=events` feed over a table with no derivable primary key (no `primary key` column, no `id` column) and no `key=` override fires W-CHANNEL-WATCHES-NO-PK (Warning, not Error ‚Äî cross-stream partition). The feed keys its `Deleted` deltas by the PK; without one it cannot key its deltas.
rationale: ¬ß38.13.2: a table with no derivable id/PK and no `key=` SHALL emit W-CHANNEL-WATCHES-NO-PK ‚Äî the feed cannot key its Deleted deltas. It is a WARNING (the feed's Inserted/Updated arms still work); asserted against the warnings stream (S92/S93 partition).
